name: Round Aluminum Balustrade Pipe 48mm
description: Standard 48mm round aluminum balustrade pipe. Suitable for residential and commercial applications. Available in 6m lengths.

name: Square Aluminum Post 50x50mm
description: Heavy-duty 50x50mm square aluminum post for balustrade systems. Wall thickness 2mm. Powder coated finish.

name: Pipe End Cap 48mm
description: Press-fit end cap for 48mm round aluminum pipes. Provides a clean, safe finish to exposed pipe ends.

name: Base Plate Flange 50mm
description: Heavy-duty aluminum base plate flange for floor-mounting posts. Includes anchor bolt holes. Dimensions: 100x100mm.

name: 90° Elbow Connector 42mm
description: Precision 90-degree elbow connector for 42mm aluminum pipe. Cast aluminum construction for durability.

name: Inline Pipe Coupler 48mm
description: Internal inline coupler/sleeve for joining two 48mm pipes end-to-end. Stainless steel set screws included.

name: T-Junction Connector 42mm
description: Three-way T-junction connector for 42mm round pipe. Ideal for mid-rail connections and branching configurations.

name: Flat Bar Aluminum 40x3mm
description: Aluminum flat bar 40x3mm. Used for capping, trim, and structural support in balustrade systems. Available in 6m lengths.

name: Round Aluminum Pipe 32mm
description: 32mm diameter round aluminum pipe. Commonly used for intermediate rails and handrails in balustrade systems.

name: Wall Bracket Mount 48mm
description: Wall-mounted pipe bracket for 48mm round pipe. Adjustable angle. Cast aluminum with stainless fixings.

name: Post Cap Square 50x50mm
description: Flat top cap for 50x50mm square aluminum posts. Snap-fit design. Provides clean, professional finish.

name: Swivel Handrail Bracket 42mm
description: Adjustable swivel bracket for 42mm handrail pipe. Adjusts ±45°. Suitable for staircase handrail installations.
